title: Skip allowance decrement for max uint256 using if not(allowance_)
description: if not(allowance_) evaluates to true when allowance_ is NOT max uint256 (since not(max) = 0 = false). This single opcode replaces a comparison against type(uint256).max, skipping the sstore decrement for infinite approvals.
when_to_apply: Any transferFrom that supports infinite allowances
when_not_to_apply: Protocols that explicitly require max allowance to be decremented
